content.en:
"To the blood spirit liquid formula, it takes three million battle merits to exchange, which is a bit expensive!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, this is the price set by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and only official members can redeem it, and even if other Dao Realms have more combat exploits, they are not eligible to obtain such a formula.

Of course.

Even if you get the formula and refine the blood spirit liquid, you are not allowed to sell it, you can only use it yourself or your own relatives.

"I don't have much merit in my hands right now, so take some time to accumulate it. "

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian used the same method to kill the Dao Void Demon.

Moreover, after he comprehended the rules of the fifth sequence of the Supreme Dao, the strength of the copied Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was even more terrifying, and he could easily wipe out a Supreme Dao Void Demon tribe, and it was naturally not difficult to accumulate combat merits.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had accumulated enough three million battle exploits.

But at this time, he also clearly felt that something was wrong with the Heavenly Blood of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and he was mobilizing the powerful Supreme Dao Void Demon, obviously preparing for the invasion of the Innate Origin Domain.

......

To the Void.

Ye Tian exchanged three million battle merits for the formula of the Supreme Blood Spirit Liquid, and after making the Supreme Dao oath, he opened the formula.

"It turns out that these resources are needed, which are really rare, and many of them are extremely precious!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Fortunately, in the mysterious and strange place, I found about fifty percent of the resources, as well as some of the resources collected before, and now there is probably a lack of more than thirty and a half percent of the resources that I haven't touched, so I will collect these resources and refine them to the blood spirit liquid. Ye Tian said darkly.

Some resources can be traded with other official members, but some extremely rare resources will not be sold by other official members, and even the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will not be sold.

If you want to get it, you can work on it.

"There are some pitfalls!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But if you think about it carefully, many official members are estimated to have exchanged for the blood spirit liquid formula, everyone needs these resources, if the Innate Origin Domain Alliance allows the exchange of all resource materials, where is it enough!

Therefore, you can only rely on yourself to slowly find resources.

And most of them are in the Dao realm, and they will never want to gather all the materials.

Among them, the three rare materials needed to refine the blood spirit liquid were the blood stone, the spirit essence of the supreme dao, and the crimson blood gold, Ye Tian could hardly find the information of these three resources, it was almost difficult to find, and there was not much relevant information.

For other materials, he can also use his own resources to trade with others, exchange them with each other, and barely make up for them.

But none of these three materials have transaction records.

Of course, it is not that there is no hope of obtaining them, and some forces use these three resources as bait to let some Supreme Dao Realms serve them or help them do things.

Obviously, the upper echelons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance controlled these three resources, and ordinary official members had little way to obtain these three resources.

Without these three resources, the recipe for the Blood Liquid that had been so hard to exchange would be in vain.

"The Innate Origin Domain Alliance does not allow the transmission of the blood spirit liquid formula, and I am probably afraid that after it is passed out, no one will buy the formula for the latecomers!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian found out that the Sioux actually had Bloodstone, and used Bloodstone to issue a task as a reward.

One hundred pieces of bloodstone, slash the sixfold peak of the blood vein to the Dao Void Demon Flowing Fang

Ye Tian didn't know much about this task, but he would know the reason after a careful investigation.

Liuya is a demonic genius with the blood of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Tyrant, with a supreme bloodline, and has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao to the realm of ten percent perfection, and his strength is definitely not inferior to that of the Taibai Sword Master.

He had killed one of the Sioux geniuses, and that genius was the heir of a certain Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, so the Sioux had been offering a bounty for this Flowing Fang.

However, the ability to save the life of the flowing teeth is too strong, and the hegemonic armor with the strongest defense can be called the strongest bloodline, the hegemonic armor cooperates with the strongest bloodline, and the defense is extremely terrifying.

Therefore, the Sioux hated the flowing teeth to the core.

Whoever kills the Flowing Fang will be able to obtain a hundred Bloodstones from the Sioux Clan, as well as a Sixth Sequence Supreme Rule item.

Ye Tian didn't look down on the sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, after all, he had comprehended the fifth sequence of Supreme Dao rules.

But for a sixth-tier Supreme Dao realm peak powerhouse like the Taibai Sword Master, a sixth-sequence Supreme Dao rule item was enough to make them crazy!

It's a pity that they can't kill the Flowing Teeth, and if they accidentally fall into the trap of the hegemonic bloodline, even if they are a strong person like the Lord of Taibai, they may fall.

In fact, since the release of this mission, two demons who have taken the path of supreme strength have fallen.

Ye Tian wanted to contact the Su Domain Lord, but the Su Domain Lord was in retreat and had no way to contact him.

So, he had no choice but to take on the task directly.

......

Heavenly Tyrant Battlefield.

This is the third-level battlefield of the Xuanmi Domain, ranking among the top ten in the third-level battlefield, and the Heavenly Tyrant Battlefield contains many resources.

It can be said that the Tianba battlefield is very important.

Ye Tian came to the Xuanmi Domain on this day.

If it was before, he would still have to apply, but now as a full member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he has directly come to the Xuanmi Domain.

This time, he is going to enter the Tianba battlefield and kill that flowing fang.

With Ye Tian's identity, he quickly entered the Tianba battlefield.

The battlefield of the Heavenly Tyrant, the Void Demon Station, is in a fortress.

Flowing Fang enjoyed the service of a group of female Dao Void Demons, as well as checking some recent information reports.

He is very comfortable here, with his strength and the protection of the overlord, no one can kill him.

So, he wasn't worried at all.

A variety of precious resources were fed to him by the Supreme Dao Void Demon maid beside him, and he tempered his body while eating.

Although the cultivation cannot be improved, the body can still be tempered little by little.

Before comprehending the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he could only cultivate like this.

"When I make a great contribution, the clan should reward a sixth sequence supreme path rule item!"

Flowtooth muttered.

Suddenly.

The maid next to him stopped moving, and his face changed suddenly.

I saw that all the maids around me kept moving, but their vitality was wiped out.

"Not good!"

He tried to escape.

But a terrifying force directly blocked the void.

Then, a large hand pinched him.

Under this force, he was completely unable to resist.

"Fifth Sequence of Solstice Rule !!!!"

He even thought that it was a certain Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm who made a move, but this is the Heavenly Overlord Battlefield, and the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm is not allowed to descend!

"It's the Sixfold Dao Realm!"

He saw Ye Tian with a look of disbelief.

But the next moment, he was directly pinched to death by Ye Tian, and the overlord couldn't stop the fifth sequence to the Dao rules.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian pretended to say a word slightly, and then he left silently with the corpse of the flowing teeth.
